summary: LOBODA Jewelry — a dropshipping-based online jewelry store (no inventory stored). Branding updated to LOBODA Jewelry with a customized logo. Menus and categories to mirror miraljewelers.com. Site is pre-launch with placeholder products until final store opening.
architectural_notes: Dropshipping vendor model — no products physically stored; site acts as storefront only
Pre-launch state: placeholder products until final store opening
known_issues: Previous build encountered an internal configuration error and may need retry
imageRequirements:
## Edit Images
- Remove background and make fully transparent, preserving gold swan emblem and 'LOBODA JEWELRY' text exactly (loboda-logo.png > loboda-logo.dim_400x400.png)
- Remove background and make fully transparent, preserving gold swan icon and 'LOBODA JEWELRY' text exactly (loboda-logo-icon.png > loboda-logo-icon.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Update the site header navigation to mirror the menu structure of miraljewelers.com. Implement the following top-level navigation items with their sub-categories: 'Engagement' (Engagement Rings, Wedding Bands, Anniversary Rings), 'Wedding' (Bridal Sets, Wedding Bands for Her, Wedding Bands for Him), 'Jewelry' (Necklaces, Earrings, Bracelets, Rings, Pendants), 'Gemstones' (Diamonds, Sapphires, Rubies, Emeralds, Other Gemstones), 'Gifts' (Gifts by Occasion, Gifts by Price, Personalized Gifts), and 'About' (Our Story, Contact Us). Each top-level item should show a dropdown with its sub-categories on hover.

Replace the current site logo in the header and footer with the uploaded LOBODA Jewelry logo (LYOLALOGObwhck.png — a gold swan emblem beside 'LOBODA JEWELRY' in bold serif/sans text). Store the logo as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/loboda-logo.png and reference it from the Header and Footer components. Ensure the site name displayed in the browser tab title and any text references is 'LOBODA Jewelry'.

Update the Marketplace hero section and category grid to use the new miraljewelers.com-style category structure. Display category cards for the main jewelry categories (Engagement Rings, Wedding Bands, Necklaces, Earrings, Bracelets, Rings) with elegant placeholder imagery. Include a clear 'Coming Soon' or 'Opening Soon' indicator on product cards and category pages to communicate the pre-launch state to visitors.

Apply a luxury jewelry visual theme throughout the site consistent with the LOBODA Jewelry brand and gold swan logo. Use a color palette of deep black/charcoal, off-white/ivory, and gold accents (#C9A84C or similar). Typography should use elegant serif fonts for headings and clean sans-serif for body text. Ensure the theme is applied consistently across the Header, Footer, Marketplace, About Us, and Contact Us pages.

Replace the existing logo asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/loboda-logo.png with the newly uploaded full vertical logo (gold swan emblem above 'LOBODA JEWELRY' lettering in gold). This logo should be used in the Header and Footer components wherever the primary site logo appears.

Store a compact horizontal or stacked variant of the LOBODA Jewelry logo (gold swan icon + 'LOBODA JEWELRY' text) as a separate static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/loboda-logo-icon.png for use in smaller contexts such as the mobile menu, favicon, or footer compact display.

Replace the existing logo assets at frontend/public/assets/generated/loboda-logo.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/loboda-logo-icon.png with transparent-background versions of the same designs. All Header, Footer, and other components currently referencing these files should continue to use the same filenames — no component code changes required unless background artifacts become visible against dark or light surfaces.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update branding: logo and store name to LOBODA Jewelry
Mirror menus and categories from miraljewelers.com
Dropshipping model: no inventory stored on site; compliance and data precautions in place

Update the backend categories to match the miraljewelers.com structure. Seed or replace existing categories with: Engagement Rings, Wedding Bands, Bridal Sets, Necklaces, Earrings, Bracelets, Rings, Pendants, Diamonds, Sapphires, Rubies, Emeralds, Other Gemstones, Personalized Gifts. No real products should be added — categories should exist as placeholders for the pre-launch state.
Update LOBODA Jewelry logo to have a transparent background
